nasb.text: For He will be handed over to the Gentiles, and will be mocked and mistreated and spit upon,

esv.text: For he will be delivered over to the Gentiles and will be mocked and shamefully treated and spit upon.

cnv.text: 他要被交給外族人，受戲弄，被凌辱，他們要向他吐唾沫，

ccb.text: 人子将被交在外族人的手里，被他们嘲弄、虐待、吐唾沫、

csbs.text: 要知道，他将被交给外邦人，被戏弄、受凌辱、被人吐唾沫；
